stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP 696 Figure 2.5.
During dispatch you perform Mass and Balance calculations. Given the following information, what is the Zero Fuel Mass CG position, expressed in inches aft of the datum?

Basic Empty Mass: 2 415 lb
Basic Empty Mass Moment: 187 645.5 in.lb
Front Seat Occupant’s Mass: 200 lb
Front Seat Occupant’s Arm: 79 in
Aft Seat Occupant’s Mass: 90 lb
Aft Seat Occupant’s Arm: 117 in
Block Fuel: 600 lb
Fuel Arm: 70 in
Disregard Start-up and Taxi Fuel values
